stemHtml:
Check the following aerodrome routine and special meteorological reports. Why was the SPECI released?

METAR LFPG 192200Z 35010KT 6000 VCTS -SHRA SCT006 FEW010 BKN020CB 08/07 Q1035 NOSIG
SPECI LFPG 192215Z 32022KTG35 2000 TS +SHRA SCT005 BKN005 OVC010 08/07 Q1035

options.a: The SPECI was released because of the thunderstorm’s approach over the airport and the precipitations’ intensification.
options.b: The SPECI was released to notify the crew about the changing conditions.
options.c: The SPECI is an intermediate message before the release of a new METAR to have more weather information.
options.d: The SPECI intended to warn the flight about the rapidly changing QNH.
